---
title: 'ISA 401 Final Project: API Data'
author: "Mia Weber, Victoria Rhodes, & Helen Kreitzer"
date: "2026-04-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# API Data: US Department of Education College Scorecard

```{r api_ohio_target_main_campuses}

library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# step 0: define API key and base URL
API_KEY <- Sys.getenv("USADOE_API_KEY")
base_url <- "https://api.data.gov/ed/collegescorecard/v1/schools"


# step 1: define exact target school names from the API
target_api_names <- c(
  "Miami University-Oxford",
  "Ohio State University-Main Campus",
  "University of Cincinnati-Main Campus",
  "Ohio University-Main Campus",
  "University of Toledo",
  "Bowling Green State University-Main Campus",
  "Cleveland State University",
  "Wright State University-Main Campus",
  "Kent State University at Kent",
  "University of Akron Main Campus",
  "Youngstown State University"
)


# step 2: collect all Ohio schools using pagination
all_data <- list()

for (i in 0:5) {
  
  query <- list(
    api_key = API_KEY,
    `school.state` = "OH",
    fields = paste(
      "id",
      "school.name",
      "school.state",
      "latest.cost.tuition.in_state",
      "latest.cost.tuition.out_of_state",
      "latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median",
      "latest.aid.median_debt.completers.overall",
      sep = ","
    ),
    per_page = 100,
    page = i
  )
  
  response <- GET(base_url, query = query)
  data_json <- content(response, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  data <- fromJSON(data_json, flatten = TRUE)
  
  all_data[[i + 1]] <- data$results
  
  Sys.sleep(1)
}


# step 3: combine all pages into one dataframe
df <- bind_rows(all_data)


# step 4: clean and rename variables
df <- df |>
  rename(
    school_name = school.name,
    state = school.state,
    tuition_in = latest.cost.tuition.in_state,
    tuition_out = latest.cost.tuition.out_of_state,
    earnings = latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median,
    debt = latest.aid.median_debt.completers.overall
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ROI = earnings - debt
  )


# step 5: keep only the 11 target main campuses
df_final_api <- df |>
  filter(school_name %in% target_api_names) |>
  select(
    id,
    school_name,
    state,
    tuition_in,
    tuition_out,
    earnings,
    debt,
    ROI
  )


# final output
df_final_api

```

```{r}
df_final_api |>
  dplyr::select(school_name, id)
```

```{r}
write.csv(
  df_final_api,
  "api_doe_data.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
